title: Fix AI form-check WebSocket frame size handling

title: Fix remaining Android Gradle provider failure
description: Flutter debug build still fails at :app:compileDebugJavaWithJavac with MissingValueException after moving SDK/cache paths to D drive. Identify and remove the Gradle provider/file collection that has no value.
notes: Found assembleDebug slowness caused by stale E-drive Flutter package_config, concurrent Flutter assemble/frontend_server processes, multiple Gradle daemons, and malformed Android SDK platform android-34 installed under android-34-2. Regenerated .dart_tool with D Flutter, stopped stale daemons, fixed SDK platform path, guarded release signing config, removed deprecated Kotlin classpath snapshot property. Gradle dry-run for :app:compileDebugJavaWithJavac succeeds.
close_reason: Fixed Gradle provider/task-graph failure and D-drive Android build slowness sources; compileDebugJavaWithJavac dry-run now succeeds after regenerating Flutter package config on D, fixing Android SDK platform 34 location, stopping stale Gradle daemons, guarding release signing config, and removing deprecated Kotlin property.

title: Fix Flutter Android debug build provider error

close_reason: Configured Android Studio and project paths to use D drive SDK/JDK/cache locations and fixed Gradle provider reads.

title: Optimize Gradle configurations to fix Flutter build slowness
description: Resolve three main performance bottlenecks: 1. Enabled Kotlin incremental compilation; 2. Reduced max JVM memory allocation for Gradle to avoid system swap/paging; 3. Enabled Gradle parallel compilation, caching, and daemon.
close_reason: Closed
